name: whatsapp-command-channel
description: Turn your own WhatsApp into a command center for Claude — text it, Claude does the work and texts back.

scripts.test: node --check command-center.cjs && node --check wa-daemon.cjs && node --check wa-watch.cjs && node --check wa-watchdog.cjs && node --check wa-reply.cjs && echo ok
scripts.check: for f in *.cjs; do node --check "$f"; done && echo ok
